extensions.notes: Windows NT is the primary Win32 family with optional native shell support and software/OpenGL rendering.

stability.rationale: Platform id is frozen for MVP, but the detailed capability matrix remains provisional while adapters and transport coverage are still being formalized.
stability.replacement_target: Replace provisional platform capability rows with release-pinned platform adapter contracts and install discovery coverage.
